scripts.validator:start: cd ../program && cargo build-sbf --features devnet && cd - && solana-test-validator --ledger "$HOME/test-ledger" --bpf-program $(solana-keygen pubkey ../target/deploy/lazorkit_program-keypair.json) ../target/deploy/lazorkit_program.so --reset
scripts.pretest: echo 'Ensure solana-test-validator is running with the program loaded'
